reviews.review_title: My brother just got banned for not 13
reviews.review_description: Hey just asking if there’s like a buttons for a junior account and also the discord said  nothing abt underage so maybe  we. Can add junior accounts with a orange sign or if not maybe you go to a kids version of vanilla when you get reported for underage

Alright, in my opinion I would say Vanilla is a great 2020 alternative for Rec Room. However, there are people who are racist but it is not as toxic as the original Rec Room. Creating rooms in Vanilla is extremely fun, along with playing quests! Not everything can be perfect, there are a ton of bugs like Weekly Challenges not existing and not being able to vote kick other rude players. A big issue rught now is no ability to claim boxes from quests but activity boxes exist at the end of Charades, Paddleball and Dodgeball (maybe Disc Golf I’m not sure.) Account creation is very simple just make sure to join the discord and do the command /create-account and create a username and password then just go into vanilla and click login to existing account and re-enter the details you used in the discord earlier. Thanks for reading my review and goodbye!
If yall are getting error code summer it means the servers are lagging cause of how much players are trying to get in

Unlike Radium you hardly need to use discord! The only thing you use it for (and it takes like 5 seconds) is join the discord to create an account. Anyways 5 stars!
